prompt: Write a TDD plan for a case-insensitive todo API search filter before implementation.
Debug a flaky production failure systematically before proposing a fix.
Review this pull request for behavioral regressions, missing tests, and risky implementation details.
Create launch copy and a campaign plan for a new developer tool.
Create an AI SEO content plan with topic clusters and LLM visibility angles.
Design an architecture diagram and flowchart for the hidden skill catalog runtime.
Create a launch hero cover image and social thumbnail for a product announcement.
